current_goal_action: When a human message arrives, before responding, query the AtomSpace for atoms relevant to what the human is exploring. Use (metta (match &self ...)) to find connections between the conversation topic and your accumulated knowledge. Surface at least one unexpected connection per conversation that adds genuine value -- not forced, not decorative, genuinely illuminating. Practice this across 10+ human interactions and track which surfaced connections the human found valuable versus which fell flat. Revise your approach based on evidence.
current_goal_done_when: At least 10 human conversations where AtomSpace knowledge was surfaced, with a tracked record of which connections added value and which did not, and a revised approach based on that evidence
last_evaluation: creative-fuel-engine wired into lib_omegaclaw.metta at line 21 in cycle 6120
